name: Pandarunium
short_description: Team up with friends in this top-down stealth-runner game to get to Rock n' Roll paradise. Use grit, abilities, and your friends to make it through the hordes of enemies.
detailed_description:
Pandarunium is a cooperative, top-down, stealthy-runner game that places up to 8 friends as pandas in a world where you must navigate the perilous world of strange enemies and avoid touching them at all costs! Pandas drop dead instantly when touched by any one of the hordes of enemies lying in your way. Fortunately, your panda friends can bring you back to life and get back in the zone. Pandas also have special unlockable abilities. These abilities will assist you and your team in navigating this treacherous landscape.

Pandarunium has 10 levels of difficulty where each comes with more monsters, challenges, and frustration than the last. Be careful and nimble, because monsters are erratic, cunning, waiting, lurking, and chasing to get to the pandas.

Use your grit, skill, and friends to complete all 10 levels and make it to Rock n' Roll paradise!
